creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
@Jamie
No worries. I understand the friction. Half of my motor-skills
still point to svn(1), and I'm still frustrated over the change.
I only chose to create a git diff because so many of the
committers tend to insist on them, or simply pass over the pr's
that don't contain them. So just figured it was the RTTD. :-)

@Alexey
Thanks for your time and the extra work on this. :-)

-- Chris
